title: Venezuelan Curry Tofu
description: A flavorful and spicy curry dish from Venezuela using tofu and piquant peppers.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Drain and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: Venezuelan Curry Powder
ingredients.notes: Available at most Latin American markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the piquant peppers and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the Venezuelan curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato and cook until the sauce has thickened, about 10 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Serve with rice, beans, or roasted vegetables if desired.
Optional: Add some heat with diced hot peppers or red pepper flakes.
